benefits.description: 72 lbs weight loss in approximately 3.5 months (November 1st start date to mid-February weigh-in at 308 lbs from starting weight of 380 lbs)
Sustained appetite suppression allowing healthy meal choices; unable to consume more than a bite or two of sugary foods
Feels better than ever, more present in kids' lives, easier to be around in general
Taste bud changes - drastic shift towards savory and spicy foods, away from sugar; developed tolerance for spicy foods after previously being unable to handle them

side_effects.description: Water retention around menstrual cycle causing 1-2 lb weight increase
Hair loss associated with rapid weight loss

protocol_notes: Titration schedule: Started at lower dose, stayed on 2.5mg for 7 weeks (from November 1st through approximately mid-December), then titrated up to 5mg in the last week of December and maintained 5mg thereafter. User reports zero side effects. Current weight 308 lbs (down from starting weight 380 lbs, goal weight 200 lbs).
